    About

    Quality Water Damage Repair

    We stand out from the rest at Water Damage Repair Tech. Our amazing technicians will blow you away with their level of quality and efficiency. Call us 24/7 for anything related to water damage and we’ll be there within the hour or faster!

     

    Whether you're dealing with a small leak or a large-scale flooding event, we have the experience and expertise to handle it all. We use industry-leading technology and equipment to quickly assess the extent of the damage and develop a plan to restore your property back to its former glory.

     

    This local business is based out of Round Rock, Tx and we’re proud to serve its citizens. We understand that addressing water damage and flooding as soon as possible is critical. Get the help you need right away by contacting us.

    Trusted Service You Can Rely On

    When water damage strikes, you need a company you can trust to act fast and do the job right. At Water Damage Repair Tech, we operate in alignment with the standards of the Better Business Bureau—focusing on honesty, transparency, and customer-first service in everything we do.
     

    From emergency response to full restoration, our team is committed to delivering reliable results while keeping you informed every step of the way. We don’t just fix the damage—we help restore your peace of mind.

    What you can expect from us:

    Rapid 24/7 emergency response

    Clear, upfront communication

    Honest assessments with no unnecessary upsells

    Quality workmanship you can depend on

    Water Damage Repair Tech

    5.0

    Based on 35 reviews

    review us on

    James Mitchinson

    15 weeks ago

    I had a great experience with Colby who responded quickly and came out same day for an inspection. I had him and a few other companies do inspections on a minor issue on my home and Colby offered the most pragmatic solutions that didn’t involve a ton of unnecessary work. To me, the hallmark of a professional you can trust is one who is not automatically pushing the highest cost solution. Colby will be my go-to for any other issues in the future and I would recommend him to anyone else looking for some help!

    Brooke H

    18 weeks ago

    Colby and his team went above and beyond our expectations. They did an excellent job removing and repairing hidden water and mold damage and were so incredibly kind throughout the entire process! They got the job done in a timely manner, had great attention to detail, and were truly a peaceful and enjoyable crew to work with in this stressful situation. We highly recommend Water Damage Repair Tech!

    Thane Tennison

    18 weeks ago

    We called Cody on a Sunday afternoon and saw him that day. We had a tricky leak that we thought was solved but then came back. What started as a simple job became more complex and he was invaluable in every step of the process. We had good communication and expectations via text and calls. The drywall team was polite and professional. His plumber referral saw us that day. His carpet team was accommodating and fast. Even the brick work we needed done looked great and Water Damage Repair Tech helped with all of it. Everyone was friendly. Always felt i got an honest fair answer.
